message:
web: Update landing page with new layout and footer

- Swap hero screenshot from list to detail view
- Replace CLI tools section with Team Dashboard feature
- Remove Session Details section, consolidate features
- Add hover effect on agent icons to spread on hover
- Add minimal footer with Docs, Changelog links and Discord icon
